title: From 2007: Vilma Espín, Rebel and Wife of Raúl Castro, Dies at 77
summary_full: An idealistic socialite who fought alongside Fidel and Raúl Castro in the mountains of Cuba, she was the country’s unofficial first lady for decades.
summary_public: An idealistic socialite who fought alongside Fidel and Raúl Castro in the mountains of Cuba, she was the country’s unofficial first lady for decades.
